What entities are present and what are they doing in the contaminant animation?
canonical_answer: A white spiky spherical structure labeled bacteria dissolves into a cloud of tiny particles. A large greenish-grey spherical object with multiple protruding spikes representing a virus floats in the foreground. White 3D letters spelling pesticides appear above a pink and green segmented larva-like creature. Jagged grey-blue rock-like objects with crystalline textures surround the text mercury.

question: Describe what is happening with the water purifier appliance features?
canonical_answer: A sleek modern water purifier with a dark blue and white color scheme features a cylindrical silver tap. A small circular blue LED light glows on the right side of the front panel. The appliance includes a transparent water tank with white measurement markings visible on the side. White text logo Aquaguard is printed on the lower front panel.

question: Describe the sequence of branding and product models shown in the first half of the video.
canonical_answer: At 2s, the Aquaguard Enhance UV logo appears with light effects; at 4s, a white and dark grey water dispenser unit is displayed with measurement markings; at 6s, the model changes to a white and translucent blue dispenser with a spigot.

question: Describe the text graphics and final water imagery presented in the latter half of the video.
canonical_answer: At 12s, large white 3D text reading 6 Stage Water Purification System appears; at 18s, text ensuring your drinking water is shown against a blue background; at 19s, a glass filled with water appears alongside the word Pure which reverses.
